_meta.description: Substack publications polled via public RSS ({subdomain}.substack.com/feed). Raw feed: title + excerpt + link + entity tags, no AI. Free posts give full-ish content in RSS; paid posts give preview only. We store only a short excerpt (capped at 280 chars) either way and always link back to the original post.
_meta.validation_status: UNVERIFIED — the sandbox that built this PR cannot reach *.substack.com (network policy blocks the host). Every entry below is a candidate from the Phase 2 task spec; Jorge needs to validate each feed locally before going live and prune any that 404 or return non-RSS. See the PR description for the failed validation attempts and the discovery candidates that couldn't be confirmed.

publications.name: (verify) Howard Beck / The Insider
